Dyn's Dizzying Draught  

Description

1: Spin and Stun for 7.5(s), up to level 55.
2: Decrease AC by 0 (L28) to 15 (L50)
3: Decrease Mana by 50 per tick
4: Decrease AGI by 2 (L28) to 51 (L50)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 150 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 35
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Fizzle Adj: 25
Deletable: Yes Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Timer: 6
Target Type: Single Spell Type: Detrimental
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You begin to spin.
Cast on other: Soandso begins to spin.
Effect Fades: You feel dizzy.

Game Description

Spins your target in a circle, preventing them from taking any action for 7 seconds up to level @1.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Dyn's Dizzying Draught

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Dyn's Dizzying Draught
ClassLevel
ENC28
Expansion:

Duration:
2 ticks

  • Sold By (10)

Dyn's Dizzying Draught were to find it

1 post
This item can be Vendor Purchased:
Abysmal Sea
Phoenth Ingven @ -220, -195, 98
Ak'Anon
Clockwork Merchant @ 1108, -993, 32
East Freeport
Eywen Nalous @ -1285, -114, 6
Erudin Palace
Horacia Garnellia @ 533, 727, 54
Neriak - Commons
Kizya D`Dbth @ 176, -925, -36
Skyshrine
Salginor @ 353, -755, 43
South Qeynos
Isobelle Losiwoo @ 326, -634, 5
Southern Felwithe
Est Treewalker @ 593, -911, 5
West Freeport
Yarina Zarampo @ -210, -892, -77
copyed from EQTC
this spell can not be reseached. But if you go to http://www.eqtraders.com there you can look up the spells and see if you can research them.

# Jan 17 2004 at 6:09 AM Rating: Decent

Isobelle Losiwoo in South Qeynos also sells this spell for approx. 14pp. She is located beside one of the casters buildings behind and to the right of the bank.

QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2003 at 5:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764570069
229 posts
One tick is six seconds.
